sys_script_include.name: AROPCheckSeeder_SPO

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_dd7002e2cf594f148935fb251d851cd5
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_snc_airop.AROPCheckSeeder_SPO</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>AROPCheckSeeder_SPO</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var AROPCheckSeeder_SPO = Class.create();
AROPCheckSeeder_SPO.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {},
    getChecks: function() {
        return [{"module":"SPO","check_name":"Virtual Agent for SPO Installed","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var sa=new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");
sa.addQuery("scope","sn_shop_va");
sa.setLimit(1);sa.query();
if(sa.next())return{status:"ready",actualValue:"v"+sa.getValue("version"),finding:"Virtual Agent for SPO is installed."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"Not installed",finding:"Virtual Agent for SPO (sn_shop_va) is not installed."};
})()","ai_justification":"Virtual Agent for SPO enables conversational AI self-service for portfolio requests, demand submission, and project status queries. Existing VA configuration indicates readiness to activate Now Assist conversational capabilities for SPO stakeholders.","remediation_guidance":"Install Virtual Agent for SPO from the ServiceNow Store.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SPO","check_name":"Supplier Product Catalog Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_shop_supplier_product");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=100)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" products",finding:c+" supplier products found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" products",finding:c+" supplier products found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 products",finding:"No supplier products found."};
})()","ai_justification":"Supplier product catalog volume reflects the breadth of procurement options available for AI-assisted sourcing recommendations. A well-populated supplier catalog enables Now Assist to suggest optimal products and vendors based on requirements.","remediation_guidance":"Populate the supplier product catalog in SPO to enable AI supplier recommendations.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SPO","check_name":"NLU Models for SPO Installed","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var sa=new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");
sa.addQuery("scope","sn_spend_nlu");
sa.setLimit(1);sa.query();
if(sa.next())return{status:"ready",actualValue:"v"+sa.getValue("version"),finding:"NLU Models for SPO are installed."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"Not installed",finding:"NLU Models for SPO (sn_spend_nlu) not installed."};
})()","ai_justification":"NLU models for SPO enable intent recognition for portfolio-related conversational requests. Trained NLU models are required for Virtual Agent topics to accurately classify and route SPO demands and project inquiries.","remediation_guidance":"Install NLU Models for Sourcing and Procurement Operations from the ServiceNow Store.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SPO","check_name":"Sourcing Activity Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_shop_sourcing_activity");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=100)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" sourcing requests",finding:c+" sourcing requests found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" sourcing requests",finding:c+" sourcing requests found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 sourcing requests",finding:"No sourcing requests found."};
})()","ai_justification":"Sourcing activity volume reflects active procurement initiatives that benefit from Now Assist summarization and AI-assisted supplier evaluation. Higher sourcing volumes increase the value of AI-generated insights and negotiation recommendations.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure sourcing requests are being submitted through SPO.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SPO","check_name":"Now Assist for SPO Installed","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var sa=new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");
sa.addQuery("scope","sn_spend_gen_ai");
sa.setLimit(1);sa.query();
if(sa.next())return{status:"ready",actualValue:"v"+sa.getValue("version"),finding:"Now Assist for SPO is installed."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"Not installed",finding:"Now Assist for SPO (sn_spend_gen_ai) is not installed."};
})()","ai_justification":"Now Assist for Strategic Portfolio Management enables AI-powered demand summarization, idea scoring, and portfolio insights. Without this plugin, portfolio and project teams cannot leverage generative AI to accelerate planning decisions and improve investment prioritization.","remediation_guidance":"Install Now Assist for SPO from the ServiceNow Store to enable AI summarization and conversational intake.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SPO","check_name":"Purchase Order Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_shop_purchase_order");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=100)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" POs",finding:c+" purchase orders found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" POs",finding:c+" purchase orders found. Limited data."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 POs",finding:"No purchase orders found."};
})()","ai_justification":"Purchase order volume reflects active procurement activity that Now Assist can assist with through summarization, approval guidance, and anomaly detection. Higher PO volumes increase the ROI of AI-assisted procurement workflows.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure purchase orders are being created and managed in ServiceNow SPO.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SPO","check_name":"Sourcing Negotiation Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_shop_negotiation");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=50)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" negotiations",finding:c+" negotiations found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" negotiations",finding:c+" negotiations found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 negotiations",finding:"No sourcing negotiations found."};
})()","ai_justification":"Sourcing negotiation volume indicates the frequency of supplier negotiations that Now Assist can assist with through document summarization, term analysis, and recommendation generation. Adequate negotiation volume maximizes AI impact on procurement outcomes.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure sourcing negotiations are being conducted through SPO.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SPO","check_name":"Purchase Requisition Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_shop_purchase_requisition");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=100)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" requisitions",finding:c+" requisitions found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" requisitions",finding:c+" requisitions found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 requisitions",finding:"No requisitions found."};
})()","ai_justification":"Purchase requisition volume indicates the frequency of procurement requests that AI Agents can automate through intake, routing, and approval orchestration. Adequate requisition volume maximizes the impact of Now Assist procurement capabilities.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure purchase requisitions are being submitted through SPO.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SPO","check_name":"SPO UI Builder App Installed","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var sa=new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");
sa.addQuery("scope","sn_spend_uib");
sa.setLimit(1);sa.query();
if(sa.next())return{status:"ready",actualValue:"v"+sa.getValue("version"),finding:"Shopping Hub is installed."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"Not installed",finding:"Shopping Hub (sn_spend_uib) is not installed. SPO AI skills unavailable."};
})()","ai_justification":"The SPO UI Builder application provides the modern workspace interface required for Now Assist embedded experiences and AI Agent interactions in Strategic Portfolio Management. Without this app, AI-powered SPO features may not render correctly.","remediation_guidance":"Install Shopping Hub from the ServiceNow Store to enable Source-to-Pay operations.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SPO","check_name":"AI Agents Installed","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var sa=new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");
sa.addQuery("scope","sn_aia");
sa.setLimit(1);sa.query();
if(sa.next())return{status:"ready",actualValue:"v"+sa.getValue("version"),finding:"Now Assist AI Agents is installed."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"Not installed",finding:"Now Assist AI Agents (sn_aia) not installed."};
})()","ai_justification":"AI Agents for SPO enable autonomous orchestration of portfolio planning tasks including demand intake, scoring, and routing. Without AI Agents installed, automated portfolio workflows and multi-step AI-driven processes cannot be activated.","remediation_guidance":"Install Now Assist AI Agents from the ServiceNow Store.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"}];
    },
    type: 'AROPCheckSeeder_SPO'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-08 20:16:50</sys_created_on><sys_id>dd7002e2cf594f148935fb251d851cd5</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>AROPCheckSeeder_SPO</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_dd7002e2cf594f148935fb251d851cd5</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-08 20:46:24</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
